title: Onna Paththi Nenachaaley Lyrics Kaadu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Onna paththi nenachaaley lyrics
Movie: Kaadu
Singer: haricharan
Music: K

Onna paththi nenachaaley
porai aerudhey
ullukulla  nodidhorum
veri aerudhey.
kannu rendum urangaama
kada podudhey.
kaalu rendum serukkoda
nada podudhey.

Oorum unnaala, azhagaagudhey
uryiaa oyaama, uyir aadudhey
kora pullkooda, maramaagudhey
kurudhi narambellaam
erumberudhey

Onna paththi nenachaaley
porai aerudhey
ullukulla  nodidhorum
veri aerudhey

Aagaayam pola unna
annaandhu paakkavechcha
padhaadhi kesamellaam
thannaala pookka vachcha.

Vaikkola pora neethaan
poonjolaiaaki vechcha
kodaangi paara enna
peengaana maaththi vechcha

Kadavul parisaaga
una naan arinjeney
thavare puriyaama
punidham adanjeney

Theruvil nadandhey nee
ponaa thaeru.
puzhudhi adhu kooda
aagum neeru.

Onna paththi nenachaaley
porai aerudhey
ullukulla  nodidhorum
veri aerudhey.
kannu rendum urangaama
kada podudhey.
kaalu rendum serukkoda
nada podudhey.

Aagaaaram thevayilla
un pera yaarum sonna
veraedhum venaam pulla
enkooda neeyum ninnaa

Ooththoda neeru pola
enkooda seru onnaa
unkooda seraavittaa
povenae naanum mannaa.

Piravi edhukkaaga
enakku theriyaadhu
adadaa una serndhaa
maranam kidayaadhu

Thonayaai iru neeyum
aaven aalaa
ena nee pirinjaa
poven paalaa.

veri aerudhey.

kaalu rendum serukkoda
nada podudhey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys deep emotions related to love and longing, reflecting the inner feelings of the characters.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Kaadu, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic aspirations.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan, known for his soulful renditions in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Onna Paththi Nenachaaley is composed by KrishnaKumar, who is recognized for his melodic compositions.

When was this song released?

The song was released on November 7, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Onna Paththi Nenachaaley, the protagonist expresses profound feelings of love and nostalgia, encapsulating the essence of romantic longing. The soothing melody, paired with Haricharan's emotive vocals, creates an atmosphere of heartfelt reflection. This song serves as a backdrop to significant moments in the movie Kaadu, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. It resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical landscape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Onna Paththi Nenachaaley from the Kaadu movie is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Haricharan's soulful voice and KrishnaKumar's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into this beautiful track that perfectly blends emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for every Tamil music lover.
stanzaMeanings: Thinking about you, the things inside me are getting intense. Both my eyes are not sleeping, my legs are walking with a rush.
The town is beautiful because of you, without any hesitation, life is dancing. Even the small flowers are blooming, and all the branches are bending down.
Thinking about you, the things inside me are getting intense.
Like the sky, I have kept my happiness aside, and all my hair is left to flow naturally.
You are the one who will come to me, and you have changed everything around me.
God has made me understand you, without any mistakes, I have realized that it is pure.
When you walk on the street, the water will flow too.
Thinking about you, the things inside me are getting intense. Both my eyes are not sleeping, my legs are walking with a rush.
No one needs to say your name, I don't want anything else, you and I are together.
Like the flowing water, we are together, if you leave, I will also go away.
I don't know why I was born, but if you are with me, death won't come.
You are like a shadow, and if you leave, I will also go away.
Thinking about you, the things inside me are getting intense. Both my eyes are not sleeping, my legs are walking with a rush.
The town is beautiful because of you, without any hesitation, life is dancing. Even the small flowers are blooming, and all the branches are bending down.
Thinking about you, the things inside me are getting intense. Both my eyes are not sleeping, my legs are walking with a rush.
